title: Discourse Markers and Cohesion
description: Master register-appropriate connectors — nevertheless, whereas, despite/in spite of, however, on the contrary, moreover, thus, thereby, albeit — to create cohesive, well-structured formal arguments and distinguish them from their informal equivalents.
sources: CEFR C1 descriptors (Council of Europe, Common European Framework of Reference)
Martin Hewings, Advanced Grammar in Use (linking ideas: contrast, addition, result, concession, Units 116–119)
